assumptions.statement: Containment observes declared presence, names, and scope assumptions only and never reads secret values.
Deployment-token authority is represented as declared-presence evidence with scope assumed and drift risk classified; token values are not inspected.
workflow_dispatch is a trigger surface only and cannot bypass authority → compile → validate → execute → proof.
Wrangler/local deploy capability is root authority; direct local deploy outside the canonical path is ROOT_AUTHORITY_BYPASS_RISK and requires containment.
Root authority classification may invalidate legitimacy but never authorizes execution or merge.
Observability evidence does not make infrastructure authority sovereign.
Undeclared root mutation surface yields containment evidence, PREO validity NULL, and merge legitimacy NULL.
